channel.title: PDF on HalfTimeOfLife
channel.description: Recent content in PDF on HalfTimeOfLife

item.title: Thesis – Detection of Anti-VM Protections Used by Malware
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: In-depth research on anti-emulation techniques and their bypass in the context of Time Travel Debugging (TTD) in full system emulation.

item.title: Linux Kernel Rootkit in 2025
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: Study of the state of Linux rootkits in 2025 through the example of the KoviD rootkit. Analysis of stealth, persistence and kernel security bypass techniques.

item.title: Anonymous Database Query Protocol
item.author: ec.charbonnier@gmail.com (Elouan Charbonnier)
item.description: Implementation of a PIR (Private Information Retrieval) protocol in C, based on Paillier homomorphic encryption to enable anonymous database querying.
